metadata.title: Dental Point - Professional Dental Care Dr. Yavor Ivanov and Dr. Katerina Ivanova
metadata.description: Professional dental care at Dental Point in Varna with Dr. Yavor Ivanov and Dr. Katerina Ivanova. Modern technology, personalized treatment, and comprehensive dental services for the whole family.
metadata.keywords: dental clinic, dentist, dental care, dr yavor ivanov, dr katerina ivanova, orthodontics, pediatric dentistry, dental implants, prosthetics, Varna, Bulgaria, dental point, professional dental care
metadata.ogTitle: Dental Point - Professional Dental Care Dr. Yavor Ivanov and Dr. Katerina Ivanova
metadata.ogDescription: Professional dental care in Varna with modern technology. Dr. Yavor Ivanov and Dr. Katerina Ivanova from Dental Point are here for your smile.

home.heroSubtitle: Dr. Yavor Ivanov & Dr. Ekaterina Ivanova
home.aboutText: In our clinic you will find modern equipment, a personal approach, and care for the whole family. We use the latest technologies and materials to provide the best treatment for our patients.
home.ctaSubtitle: Book an appointment and experience professional care

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We are here to help you
contact.holidaysText: The clinic is closed during official holidays.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: Meet our specialists
team.person1Description: Dr. Ivanov is an experienced dentist with over 9 years of practice in pediatric dentistry. He specializes in preventive care, cavity treatment, and orthodontics. Known for his gentle approach with young patients and his ability to create a comfortable atmosphere during treatment. He holds certifications for working with the latest dental technologies.
team.person2Description: Dr. Ivanova is an orthodontics specialist with rich experience in correcting dental irregularities in adults and children. She has completed specialization in modern orthodontic techniques and works with the latest bracket systems. She is distinguished by her individual approach to each patient and her pursuit of perfect results. She actively participates in professional conferences and improvement courses.
team.ctaTitle: We are ready to take care of your smile
